subject: Action needed: canary planning in San Francisco | Albert Einstein | Q4 review | INIT-6317
body: Here is a progress summary for the canary plan in San Francisco. Current status is review with weekly updates owned by delivery. Document sightings of kangaroos and koalas near transport hubs, rooftops, and civic precincts. Confirm owners for each work package and share ETA by end of day. Albert Einstein is cited as a case study for risk management in this domain. Reference initiative INIT-6317. Please add your comments before tomorrow morning. Tracking tags: coffee, coordination.
